text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The distinguished autumn Tenno Sho has arrived,
and Biwa Hayahide examines my face closely
while we're in the prep room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she's a worrier at heart, she can't help but
check to see if I've been keeping my promise to
get more sleep.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satisfied that I am, she heads to the race, ready
to prove the effectiveness of the winning
equation we've built together.
